subject.title: A Universal Machine Learning Framework Driven by Artificial Intelligence for Ion Battery Cathode Material Design

audited_claim_quote.text: BatteryFormer accurately reproduces the experimental average voltages for seven representative lithium-ion cathode materials
audited_claim_quote.location: main text, discussion of Figure 6a (PMC full text)

figure_caption_quote.text: (a) Comparison between BatteryFormer-predicted and experimentally measured average voltages for six representative lithium-ion cathode materials.
figure_caption_quote.note: Caption says six; the figure shows seven labeled bar pairs and the body text names seven compounds. Recorded as a subject-paper internal discrepancy; does not affect the anchored subset.

value_source.image_sha256_note: record on download at generator-independence check; image is not a generator input
value_source.method: Values are typographic labels printed above each bar, transcribed at 4x zoom (two independent reads, consistent). This is transcription of printed numbers, not marker digitization; u_v = 0.005 V (half of the last printed digit).
value_source.si_note: SI Table S7 (tabulated values) is cited by the paper but hosted behind the publisher's access controls (HTTP 403 to automated retrieval on 2026-07-02); the registered digitization branch was therefore exercised on the open-access PMC figure. Author-provided values supersede per the registered uncertainty rule.

anchors_V.source: Padhi, Nanjundaswamy, Goodenough, J. Electrochem. Soc. 144, 1188 (1997)
standard 3.9-4.1 V plateau window; range-match caveat pre-flagged in registration
Thackeray et al., Mater. Res. Bull. 18, 461 (1983); Ohzuku et al., JES 137, 769 (1990); average of the two plateaus

x1_range_mismatch.basis: The paper's methods text does not define the (de)lithiation range for its average-voltage labels (it states only that training data came from the Materials Project Battery Explorer with a -1 to 7 V selection window). The registered x1 rule requires a mismatch demonstrable from the paper's methods text BEFORE value comparison; silence does not demonstrate a mismatch, so no datapoint is excluded. The LiCoO2 pre-flag is retained as a disclosed caveat in the verdict artifact.
x1_range_mismatch.quote: All training data used in this work were sourced from the Battery Explorer module provided by the Materials Project, with the selected voltage range for cathode materials between -1 to 7 V.

x2_unreadable_value.basis: all three anchored values are printed labels, u_v = 0.005 V, far below the 0.10 V bar

secondary_context.paper_experiment_labels_vs_tier_a_anchor: The paper's own experiment bars (LiFePO4 3.4, LiCoO2 3.9, LiMn2O4 4.0) differ from the committed Tier-A anchors (3.45, 4.0, 4.05) by 0.05 to 0.10 V; reference-choice scatter, recorded as context, never a verdict input.
secondary_context.mp_reference_decomposition: Registered secondary; requires Materials Project Battery Explorer values for the three couples. To be retrieved at generator-run time if access is available; omitted with disclosure otherwise.
